item.title: Two Boys Held Captive for Years
item.description: A case involving two young boys held captive for years, focusing on the investigation and the impact on those involved.

item.title: Confession Revealed After 40 Years
item.description: A long-delayed confession brings new attention to a decades-old case and the questions that remained unanswered for years.

item.title: Case of a Boy Found in His Basement
item.description: A factual look at the case of a young boy found in his own basement, with attention to the investigation and unanswered questions.
